_comment: Used-vehicle listings for in-game acquisition. mode maps to Travel.Mode (bike/motorcycle/car). trunk_lb is how much product the vehicle lets you HOLD and haul; it raises PlayerState.capacity_lb() when owned and becomes that mode's travel carry limit. Prices reflect rough US used-market floors; condition is plain and honest (no hype).

bike.name: Commuter hybrid w/ rear rack
bike.condition: Rear rack and panniers. Room for a duffel.

bike.name: Old cargo bike
bike.condition: Front cargo box. Slow but hauls.

motorcycle.name: '08 Ninja 250, high miles
motorcycle.condition: Tank bag only. Runs, needs tires.

car.name: High-mile hatchback
car.condition: Seats fold flat. Lots of room.

car.name: Old work pickup w/ cap
car.condition: Bed cap, tow package. Hauls weight.
